---
name: Feature Request
about: What do you need? Maude will recommend the right module.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or need. What are you trying to accomplish?

## Proposed solution

How do you think it should work?

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider? Why didn't it work?

## Which module does this affect?

- [ ] daemon (Room daemon toolkit)
- [ ] governance (Standards and enforcement)
- [ ] memory (Memory and audit)
- [ ] healing (Self-healing)
- [ ] coordination (Cross-room coordination)
- [ ] maude (Configuration authority)
- [ ] Other / New module

## Additional context

Anything else. Diagrams, examples, references.

*"She hugs your infrastructure."*
